Package fiveCard

Class Deck

java.lang.Object
fiveCard.Deck
public class Deck extends Object
Represents all data and operations for a deck of standard playing cards used in various casino games. fiveCard.Deck.java CPSC243 Spring 2026

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Deck(int reshuffleCount)
    Constructor for a deck, Fills deck with 1 of each card type, based on the suit and rank enums.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    cardsLeft()
    Returns the amount of cards left in the deck that haven't been drawn already
    Card
    deal()
    Retrieves the card at the top of the draw pile, only allows the deal if not drawing past the reshuffleCount value
    Card
    dealIgnoringReshuffle()
    Retrieves the card at the top of the draw pile, ignoring if we pass reshuffleCount
    int
    getReshuffleCount()
    Getter for the reshuffleCount, which denotes when the deck should be reshuffled
    int
    getTop()
    Getter for the top value, which references where the top of the draw pile is
    void
    shuffle(int reshuffleCount)
    Shuffles the cards in a deck in a randomized fashion, and changes the reshuffleCount (which denotes when to reshuffle)

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck(int reshuffleCount) throws PokerException
      Constructor for a deck, Fills deck with 1 of each card type, based on the suit and rank enums. For poker, this will be 52 cards. Do note the hand is constructed in an ordered pattern, unshuffled
      Parameters:
      reshuffleCount - The value describing when to reshuffle the deck
      Throws:
      PokerException - If reshuffleCoint is > 52

  • Method Details

    • getTop

      public int getTop()
      Getter for the top value, which references where the top of the draw pile is
      Returns:
      The index of the current top of the deck

    • getReshuffleCount

      public int getReshuffleCount()
      Getter for the reshuffleCount, which denotes when the deck should be reshuffled
      Returns:
      The index where a reshuffle is required to occur

    • cardsLeft

      public int cardsLeft()
      Returns the amount of cards left in the deck that haven't been drawn already
      Returns:
      The number of undrawn cards left in the deck

    • deal

      public Card deal() throws PokerException
      Retrieves the card at the top of the draw pile, only allows the deal if not drawing past the reshuffleCount value
      Returns:
      The card drawn from the current top of the deck
      Throws:
      PokerException - If drawing a card past the reshuffleCount

    • dealIgnoringReshuffle

      public Card dealIgnoringReshuffle()
      Retrieves the card at the top of the draw pile, ignoring if we pass reshuffleCount
      Returns:
      The card drawn from the current top of the deck

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle(int reshuffleCount)
      Shuffles the cards in a deck in a randomized fashion, and changes the reshuffleCount (which denotes when to reshuffle)
      Parameters:
      reshuffleCount - The new reshuffleCount, enforced here as it should change between shuffles
